notes: 17 open Repo Assist draft PRs as of 2026-03-22. No merges since 2026-03-04. All PRs verified clean (mergeable_state: clean, 2026-03-21). Issue #23 is CLOSED. Issue #15 (failure notice) still open — maintainer should close it. Do NOT create more code PRs until maintainer starts reviewing existing ones. Task 8 (release): v0.0.1, no CHANGELOG, no tags, project too early for a release — deferred. Task 9 (welcome): no new contributors in last 24h on 2026-03-22. Task 10 (forward): Investigated AccessTree/FocusManager in accessibility.rs — data structures are mature with full tests. Gap for 'Complete AccessKit integration' is in lib.rs window event loop: AccessTree is built during draw() but never fed to winit's accesskit adapter (winit supports this via WindowHandler accesskit feature). InputState in input/mod.rs lacks multi-click (PR #36 adds click_count()). TextEditState in input/text_state.rs is comprehensive (undo/redo, selection, unicode). text-input-rewrite stream items (drag-to-select, horizontal scroll, UTF-16 offset conversion, InputHandler trait, event emission) are all buildable after PR #36 merges. Next priority after backlog clears: (a) AccessKit adapter wiring in lib.rs, (b) text-input-rewrite stream (drag-to-select p2), (c) visual regression harness after PR #37.

dep_audit_2026_03_21.notes: Cannot verify latest versions without internet access. smallvec 1.11 and unicode-segmentation 1.10 likely have newer patch versions. Consider a dep update PR after backlog clears.

accesskit_investigation_2026_03_22.status: AccessTree and FocusManager data structures fully implemented in accessibility.rs with comprehensive tests. DrawContext.with_accessibility() constructor exists. Gap: lib.rs window event loop does not pass AccessTree to winit accesskit adapter. winit 0.30 supports accesskit via feature flag. Next step: audit lib.rs for where draw() is called and wire AccessTree update into winit window event handler.
